title: We Found Love
why_this_song: We Found Love by Rihanna (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "We found love in a hopeless place"

Appears 16 times; first heard in: "We found love in a hopeless place"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "As your shadow crosses mine"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Now we're standing side by side"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "found" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "found" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hopeless" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hopeless" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: "We Found Love" was released in 2011. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "We Found Love" foi lançada em 2011. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "We Found Love" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "We Found Love" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
